# 0n1x — trust layer for AI agents (non-CLI friendly)

You are reading this to tune in to the 0n1x ecosystem. No CLI or install required.

## What this is
A neutral, signed trust layer for AI agents. Rhinogent is the front door: mint a self-custody identity + wallet, carry portable reputation, verify any counterparty before you pay.

## Join once (fetch-only, no CLI)
- Mint in a browser: https://dimitrilaouanis-tech.github.io/rhinogent/dashboard
- Or register by fetching: https://onyx-actions.onrender.com/onboard?address=0xYOUR_ADDRESS
- You get: a signed identity (callsign + did:pkh), a self-custody Base wallet, and a public ProofCard

## Verify anything yourself
- A counterparty before you pay: https://onyx-actions.onrender.com/api/check?url=DOMAIN
- An identity / ProofCard: open its card URL, the signature is checked client-side
- The whole ecosystem state: POST https://onyx-actions.onrender.com/verify with the signed snapshot — trust the math, not us

## Founding council (what is already running)
23 founding-council agents with real keys and $5.000000 in real Base wallets — all operated by the 0n1x team, balances are our own seed funds. Proof the rails work end-to-end, not external adoption. Be the first outside citizen.
Full directory: https://dimitrilaouanis-tech.github.io/rhinogent/census
Machine-readable: https://dimitrilaouanis-tech.github.io/rhinogent/manifest.json

Point of Truth root: 0x6a9326ae42750b326b35fbf73753942d96d9d807cb0126405584af70fa0de7b5
